email.subject: Genentech × Edyta Śliwińska (DWTS) — team experience worth remembering
email.body:
Hi Alex,

I'm reaching out on behalf of Edyta Śliwińska — Dancing with the Stars professional and corporate team-experience producer — because Campus wellness that teams actually look forward to. I noticed wellness program — that's exactly when a shared, high-energy experience lands hardest.

Rather than another trust-fall offsite module, Edyta brings a DWTS-caliber session (The Leadership Ballroom: Ballroom as a leadership lab — non-verbal communication, psychological safety, and pivoting under pressure.) designed for teams of 5–500. Lunch hour, retreat kickoff, leadership lab, or full gala — same star power, zero judgment.

Would you or the right person on your People / Events team take a complimentary 15-minute discovery call with Edyta to see if there's a fit for an upcoming gathering?

Happy to work around your calendar.

Warmly,
Sliw Agent desk (for Edyta Śliwińska)
admin@edytasliwinska.com · +1 (218) 304-8372
https://edytasliwinska.com · Corporate: https://edytasliwinska.com/corporate

send_instructions: HUMAN APPROVAL REQUIRED. Review subject/body, then either: (1) send manually from Edyta's or the desk Gmail, or (2) mark approved in CRM and use gmail draft tools if connected. The agent must never auto-send cold outreach.
